name: Blunder Man
bio: I'm an advanced/intermediate chess player on a mission to stop blundering — and help you do the same. Watch my journey on YouTube and take your game to the next level with personalized 1-on-1 coaching.

cards.title: 1-on-1 Coaching
cards.description: Personalized sessions tailored to your level and goals. Pick a time that works.

cards.title: Games & Analysis
cards.description: An intermediate player's honest take on games, openings, and the road to improvement.

cards.title: Community
cards.description: Share games, ask questions, and play against other members of the community.

cards.title: Live Streams
cards.description: Catch live gameplay, real-time analysis, and banter with chat.

cards.title: Quick Clips
cards.description: Bite-sized chess content, highlights, and quick tips.

cards.title: Blunder Man Shop
cards.description: Shirts and gear from the official Blunder Man merch store.

cards.title: One-Time Donation
cards.description: Donate any amount via PayPal. No account required.

cards.title: Chess Training AI
cards.description: AI-powered training tool. Try it through this referral link.

cards.title: Membership Referral
cards.description: Sign up for Chess.com through this referral. Costs you nothing extra.
